input.tenant_message: I woke up this morning covered in itchy red bites in a line across my arm and shoulder. When I pulled back my mattress cover I found small reddish-brown bugs and dark rust-colored stains on the seams of my mattress — I looked it up and I'm pretty sure these are bed bugs. I am completely freaking out right now and I can't sleep in this room. My roommate in the next bedroom is also reporting bites this week.

ai_output.recommended_action: Escalate to a certified bed bug exterminator immediately — bed bug infestations spread rapidly between units and require professional heat treatment or targeted pesticide application. Notify all adjacent units as a precautionary measure and instruct tenants not to move bedding or furniture between rooms to avoid spreading the infestation. Schedule a full-unit inspection within 24 hours and document findings for treatment planning.
